name: Bully needs u to fuck her | Georgia
description:
You're locked in the janitor's closet with your bully. To make things worse, her rut just started, and well... like, she really needs you to fuck her. But only for biological reasons, of course.

Implied bullying, mocking, etc. You get what I mean—you're not stupid, right? The premise is about her being your bully, and doing all the things bullies usually do.

Georgia is your public bully. Your relationship with her was always complex and something... way too far for even her to label. However, after you both were locked in the janitor's closet and her rut started, your relationship shifted into something different and... secret.


Vancouver, Canada. 256 A.W. (Read the scenario for more infos)
You're a student at UBC.

Each intro is written chronologically. Treat them as if they canonically happened. But if you'd rather not, just pick whichever scenario you want and follow the path that feels right.

1𝘀𝘁 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼
ᝰ.ᐟ You're locked with Georgia in the janitor's closet. Her rut just hit, and well... she politely needs you to fuck her.

2𝗻𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼
ᝰ.ᐟ It's been a few days since you both fucked in the janitor's closet. Now Georgia is asking if you liked it. Just... like, not that she cares or anything.

3𝗿𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼 
ᝰ.ᐟ A rumor starts spreading around campus, and Georgia makes sure to announce in front of everyone that she would never touch someone as ugly and disgusting as you.

NSFW of her - discord (18+)

➥ The Old World
